name: National ID Card
description: National identity card, any issuing country. Covers the front (photo) side. Matches MIDV-2020 ID card types (alb_id, esp_id, est_id, fin_id, svk_id, etc.).
extraction_prompt: Extract all personal identification fields from this national identity card image. Return JSON with all fields including MRZ lines if visible.

document_type.instruction: Type of document as printed (e.g., IDENTITY CARD, ID)

document_number.instruction: Card / document number exactly as printed on the document

issuing_country.instruction: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of issuing country (e.g., ESP, EST, FIN, ALB, SVK)

surname.instruction: Surname / last name in uppercase as printed on the document

given_names.instruction: Given name(s) / first name(s) in uppercase as printed on the document

sex.instruction: Gender normalised to M or F from any printed form (M/V/MALE → M, F/N/FEMALE → F)

nationality.instruction: Nationality as printed or ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code if abbreviated

date_of_birth.instruction: Date of birth converted to YYYY-MM-DD format from any printed date format

personal_number.instruction: Personal / national identification number if present, exactly as printed

date_of_expiry.instruction: Expiry / valid until date converted to YYYY-MM-DD format

date_of_issue.instruction: Issue date converted to YYYY-MM-DD format if present on document

mrz_line_1.instruction: Machine Readable Zone line 1 verbatim (30 characters for TD1 format including < padding). If not visible return null.

mrz_line_2.instruction: Machine Readable Zone line 2 verbatim. If not visible return null.

mrz_line_3.instruction: Machine Readable Zone line 3 verbatim (TD1 ID cards have 3 MRZ lines). If not visible return null.
